snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-57111: Apache Helix REST: Permissive CORS Configura"; content:"CVE-2026-57111"; nocase; sid:6184373; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
